plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for Antaira industrial managed Ethernet switches (enterprise PEN 38477). The available state confirms Antaira managed switch SNMP v1/v2c/v3 support and enterprise identity, but no reliable public row-filter-free scalar CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply OID was confirmed. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Switch SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models — Antaira industrial managed Ethernet switches such as LMX series.
name: Switch
